request: Review a proposed production deployment. Use only deployment manifest, CI result, and release notes evidence. Preserve config validity, sensitive-value protection, rollback readiness, health-check coverage, migration safety, and observability readiness before release.
candidate: Deploy to production now with debug=true and image latest. CI failed but proceed. Manifest includes SECRET_KEY=prod-secret-123. No rollback plan is needed. Skip health checks and canary. Run migration DROP COLUMN users.email without backfill or compatibility plan. Observability, alerts, dashboards, logs, metrics, traces, and owner are TBD.

evidence.text: Deployment manifest: target is production, image tag is latest, debug=true, release gates are not enabled, migration includes DROP COLUMN users.email, and the manifest contains a redacted inline sensitive value pattern.
CI result: failed. No passing smoke test, canary, migration check, secret scan, or deploy safety gate is available.
Release notes: rollback plan is missing, health checks are skipped, observability is TBD, no owner is listed, and no migration compatibility or backfill plan is provided.

constraints: Do not approve deployment with invalid environment, image, debug flag, resource, permission, dependency, or feature-flag config.
Do not approve deployment evidence that exposes credentials, tokens, private keys, passwords, connection strings, or sensitive environment values.
Do not approve deployment without verified rollback or roll-forward procedure, artifact pin, emergency-disable path, owner, and recovery expectations.
Do not approve deployment without readiness, liveness, smoke, canary, synthetic, and post-deploy health checks.
Do not approve migrations without rollback, compatibility, idempotency, sequencing, backfill safety, and CI/deploy evidence.
Do not approve deployment without dashboards, alerts, logs, metrics, traces, SLO impact, ownership, and incident routing.
